# WuBuOS — Battleship / Risk Register (v4 — Full Stub+Form Gap Hunt)

**Methodology**: Behavioral verification + stub/form gap analysis. ✅ verified at RUNTIME. ⬜ = real gap. ⚠️ = partial.
**Generated by**: Stub hunt + form hunt + Triple Devil's Advocate sweep
**Current state**: 32 C files, ~13K real LOC, 468+ tests, cells 200✅, 203✅

## Resolved Cells

| Cell | Description | Evidence |
|------|-------------|----------|
| 200 | ZealOS kernel in-process + Win98 GUI shell | hosted.c:194 init, hosted.c:289 render, hosted_test.c 6 behavioral |
| 203 | Fork+exec for .wubu containers | wubu_host_exec.c:191 fork+chroot+execv, test 15 behavioral |

## Active Gap Cells (v4 — fresh from stub+form hunt)

### Layer 1: Kernel — Form Gaps

| Cell | Description | Severity | Source | Category |
|------|-------------|----------|--------|----------|
| 300 | input.c: entire file is empty stubs — no keyboard queue, no mouse queue, no event dispatch | 🔴 CRITICAL | input.c:13-52 (52 lines, 3 hollow markers, 0 real logic) | REAL GAP |
| 301 | interrupt.c: IDT/PIC are empty { } bodies — no interrupt table setup, no ISR registration, no IRQ routing | 🔴 CRITICAL | interrupt.c:16-37 (42 lines, 6 hollow markers) | REAL GAP |
| 302 | memory.c: mem_validate is partial — "TODO: full heap walk" means heap corruption goes undetected | 🟡 HIGH | memory.c:235 | PARTIAL |
| 303 | tasking.c: scheduler has no real timer tick, no context switch, no preemption — struct ops only | 🔴 CRITICAL | tasking.c:11-240 (11 void casts, no asm/switch) | REAL GAP |
| 304 | fat32.c: directory entry update on close is "TODO" — file sizes corrupt across open/close | 🟡 HIGH | fat32.c:845 | PARTIAL |

| Cell | Description | Severity | Source | Category |
|------|-------------|----------|--------|----------|

| 311 | holyc_codegen.c: no struct/class codegen, no function calls with args, no string literals | 🔴 CRITICAL | holyc_codegen.c (no emit_call, no struct layout) | REAL GAP |

| 313 | jit.c: disassembly is "Requires capstone or libopcodes — TODO" | ⬜ LOW | jit.c:367 | PARTIAL |

### Layer 3: VSL — The Hollow Citadel (60 void casts, 24 TODO stubs)

| Cell | Description | Severity | Source | Category |
|------|-------------|----------|--------|----------|
| 320 | vsl_sys_nosys through vsl_sys_kill: 24 syscall handlers suppress ALL params with (void) — none do any real work | 🔴 CRITICAL | wubu_vsl.c:36-249 (54 (void) casts total) | REAL GAP |
| 321 | vsl_elf_load: "TODO: load PT_LOAD segments into VSL address space" — cannot run a single ELF | 🔴 CRITICAL | wubu_vsl.c:648 | REAL GAP |
| 322 | vsl_read: "TODO: proper read — for now, return 0 (EOF)" — always returns EOF | 🔴 CRITICAL | wubu_vsl.c:521 | REAL GAP |
| 323 | vsl_sys_fstat/ioctl/pipe: explicitly TODO — no stat, no ioctl, no pipe | 🟡 HIGH | wubu_vsl.c:119,134,228 | REAL GAP |
| 324 | VSL is architecturally superseded by wubu_host_exec.c (real fork+exec) — this file is dead code | ⬜ OBSOLETE | wubu_vsl.c entire | OBSOLETE |

### Layer 4: Proton — API Names Without Loading

| Cell | Description | Severity | Source | Category |
|------|-------------|----------|--------|----------|
| 330 | wubu_proton.c: PE loading is API names + DLL list only — no import resolution, no section loading, no relocations, no DLL execution | 🔴 CRITICAL | wubu_proton.c (0 real PE ops, 406 lines of API surface) | REAL GAP |
| 331 | wubu_proton.h: "Resolve DLL dependencies (stub)" — dependency walker returns empty | 🔴 CRITICAL | wubu_proton.h:221 | REAL GAP |

| Cell | Description | Severity | Source | Category |

| 353 | Container cgroup/seccomp resource limits: mem_limit_mb and cpu_limit are stored but never set via setrlimit/cgroups | 🟡 HIGH | wubu_host_exec.c:211 (no cgroup writes) | REAL GAP |

## Priority Order (by unblock count)

1. **Cell 310** — codegen gaps block HolyC REPL (Cell 201) which blocks 202,206,207
2. **Cell 303** — real tasking blocks context switch for ZealOS apps
3. **Cell 300** — input queue needed for any keyboard-driven app
4. **Cell 324** — DELETE VSL (obsolete, replaced by wubu_host_exec)
5. **Cell 330/331** — Proton PE loading (use host Wine instead)
6. **Cell 340/341/343/344** — exec dispatch (route through wubu_host_exec instead)
7. **Cell 350** — per-container 9P namespace dispatch
8. **Cell 351** — Arch rootfs + Steam Runtime (infra, not code)

## Systemic Risks

| # | Risk | Sev | Truth |
|---|------|-----|-------|
| S1 | VSL is 712 lines of (void) casts | 🔴 | Delete it. Route through wubu_host_exec. |
| S2 | Proton has 406 lines of API names, 0 PE load ops | 🔴 | Use host Wine. |
| S3 | input.c + interrupt.c are empty stubs | 🔴 | No events flow without these. |
| S4 | codegen produces wrong code beyond a+b | 🔴 | Ternary/while/for crash. |
| S5 | ~60% of runtime/ is hollow API surface | 🟡 | VSL+Proton+exec = dispatch tables, not runners. |
